title: "Social Media and Mental Health: Is There a Hidden Cost?"
author: "Stephanie Clarke"
date: "2026-05-02"
format:
  html:
    theme: pulse
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Contents"
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    self-contained: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
